opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I saved my $800 couch from my dog for $47
opportunities.before_state: Stained, fur-covered sofa with visible wear, embarrassing when guests visit
opportunities.after_state: Fresh, sleek, fur-free couch that looks brand new — guest-ready in 5 minutes
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in April — pet owners are actively searching for solutions as double coats blow out and fur overtakes furniture.

opportunities.specific_product: pull-out 2-tier under-sink cabinet organizer with adjustable shelves
opportunities.transformation_hook: I turned my chaotic bathroom cabinet into a spa for $34
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered under-sink cabinet stuffed with random bottles, cleaning supplies, and hair tools falling everywhere
opportunities.after_state: Neat pull-out shelves with everything visible and accessible — looks like a Pinterest bathroom
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning is at its annual search peak in April and bathroom organization consistently dominates home transformation content this week.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia expandable kitchen utensil drawer organizer set
opportunities.transformation_hook: My junk drawer nightmare is gone — $28 total fix
opportunities.before_state: Chaotic utensil drawer crammed with tangled tools, impossible to find anything, broken items buried underneath
opportunities.after_state: Fully segmented, clean drawer where every tool has a home — opens satisfyingly on camera
opportunities.why_now: Spring kitchen organization drives massive April search volume, and Syruvia's 20% commission makes this a high-ROI category for the channel.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper adjustable fill pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: I stopped waking up with neck pain — $79 pillow changed everything
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed, lumpy pillow causing neck stiffness every morning, poor sleep quality for years
opportunities.after_state: Customized loft pillow perfectly contoured for side sleeping — wake up pain-free with a bedroom that looks hotel-worthy
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness search intent remains extremely high in Q2 2026 and Eli & Elm's 20% commission at a $79 price point yields the highest per-sale return in the pillow category.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products modern accent chair with wood legs
opportunities.transformation_hook: One $159 chair made my living room look designed
opportunities.before_state: Bare corner of a living room or bedroom that looks unfinished, builder-basic, and impersonal
opportunities.after_state: Styled reading nook or living room anchor piece that makes the whole room feel intentional and curated
opportunities.why_now: Spring room refresh intent spikes in April as people open up their homes after winter, and single-item room transformations are the highest-performing Reel format this quarter.
